nasb.text: when all Israel comes to appear before the Lord your God at the place which He will choose, you shall read this law in front of all Israel in their hearing.

esv.text: when all Israel comes to appear before the Lord your God at the place that he will choose, you shall read this law before all Israel in their hearing.

cnv.text: 以色列眾人來到耶和華你的　神選擇的地方朝見他的時候，你要在以色列眾人面前把這律法宣讀給他們聽。

ccb.text: 所有以色列人到你们的上帝耶和华选定的地方朝见祂时，你们要当众大声宣读这律法。
